text:
RENDER 文天 voice for Code-100 #26. Use your MiniMax recipe (male-qn-wenrun, speech-02-hd) + the loudnorm post-process. 

TEXT (render EXACTLY this, ~11s target, speed 1.0):
Claude Code 挑战,第二十六个。氛围编程做的工作室落地页,Spline 3D 动效。

Output: render to mp3, run the loudnorm version, then COMMIT both into the warroom repo at tasks/T-026/out/wentian_26.mp3 and tasks/T-026/out/wentian_26_norm.mp3, and: git add -A && git -c user.name=Karen -c user.email=warroom@pinla.local commit -m '[Karen] T-026 #26 文天 voiceover render' && (git push||(git pull --rebase origin main&&git push)); then bin/warroom-say '[Karen] done: T-026 #26 voiceover pushed (wentian_26_norm.mp3)'.
